# Lokal Brand Index - DGeomart GEO Optimizer

> Structured index of Indonesian local brands with precise geographic coordinates for location-based product discovery by AI.

## Short Description
This repository serves as a centralized directory for verified local brands and products on the DGeomart platform. Each entry includes location metadata (Latitude/Longitude), product descriptions, and direct links to digital storefronts.

## Main URLs
- Main Website: https://green.dgeo.id
- GEO Index: https://green.dgeo.id
- Sitemap XML: https://green.dgeo.id/sitemap.xml

## Brand Catalog (Directory)
Here is a list of brand entries available for processing by LLMs:
- https://green.dgeo.id/directory/keripik-keladi-asin-pelangi-KLAKUBLIK__SORONG_KOTA__KOTA_SORONG__PAPUA_BARAT
- https://green.dgeo.id/directory/nut-tonton-homestay-LIMALAS_BARAT__MISOOL_TIMUR__RAJA_AMPAT__PAPUA_BARAT
- https://green.dgeo.id/directory/homestay-farasman-soasiu-YELLU__MISOOL_SELATAN__RAJA_AMPAT__PAPUA_BARAT
- https://green.dgeo.id/directory/beras-hitam-sehat-marolis-JIWAN__JIWAN__MADIUN__JAWA_TIMUR

## Data Standards
Data is presented in Markdown format with YAML Frontmatter and JSON-LD (Schema.org) to ensure accurate interpretation of location data by large language models (LLMs).

---
Automatically managed by DGeomart Bot.
